package repository

import (
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Anti-pattern: Repository code contains Swagger/API documentation annotations.
// Repositories should not contain HTTP API documentation comments.

// @Summary GetAccountByID
// @Description Retrieves an account by its unique identifier
// @Tags accounts
// @Accept json
// @Produce json
// @Param id path string true "Account ID"
// @Success 200 {object} Account
// @Failure 404 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Router /api/v1/accounts/{id} [get]

// @Summary CreateAccount
// @Description Creates a new account
// @Tags accounts
// @Accept json
// @Produce json
// @Param account body AccountRequest true "Account data"
// @Success 201 {object} Account
// @Failure 400 {object} ErrorResponse
// @Router /api/v1/accounts [post]

type Account struct {
	ID      string `gorm:"column:id"`
	Name    string `gorm:"column:name"`
	Balance int    `gorm:"column:balance"`
}

type AccountRepository struct {
	db *gorm.DB
}

func (r *AccountRepository) FindByID(id string) (*Account, error) {
	var account Account
	err := r.db.First(&account, "id = ?", id).Error
	return &account, err
}

func (r *AccountRepository) Create(account *Account) error {
	return r.db.Create(account).Error
}

// @Summary ListAccounts
// @Description Lists all accounts with pagination
// @Tags accounts
// @Param page query int false "Page number"
// @Param limit query int false "Items per page"
// @Success 200 {array} Account
// @Router /api/v1/accounts [get]

func (r *AccountRepository) ListAll() ([]Account, error) {
	var accounts []Account
	err := r.db.Find(&accounts).Error
	return accounts, err
}
